pullRequest.title: Add asyncio event loop
pullRequest.body:
Fixes https://github.com/elevenlabs/elevenlabs-python/issues/544

Adds a new asyncio event loop and adds documentation.

pullRequest.title: Fix issue with conversation when no auth is required
fix: make audio_interface optional for text-only chat mode
pullRequest.body:
## Summary
Makes `audio_interface` parameter optional in both `Conversation` and `AsyncConversation` to support chat-only (text_only) mode without requiring audio setup.

## Changes
- `audio_interface` parameter now defaults to `None` in `Conversation.__init__()` and `AsyncConversation.__init__()`
- Added None-guards around audio operations (start, stop, output, interrupt) in both sync and async classes
- When no `audio_interface` is provided, audio setup is skipped and audio events are silently ignored

This matches the documented chat-mode API at https://elevenlabs.io/docs/agents-platform/guides/chat-mode

Fixes #632

This contribution was developed with AI assistance (Claude Code).

<!-- CURSOR_SUMMARY -->
---

> [!NOTE]
> **Medium Risk**
> Changes conversation initiation payload defaults and config handling, which could affect existing integrations relying on mutability or audio behavior; however the change is largely additive and covered by new tests.
> 
> **Overview**
> Enables **text-only (chat) mode** by making `audio_interface` optional in `Conversation` and `AsyncConversation`, and by skipping/guarding all audio lifecycle calls (`start`/`stop`/`output`/`interrupt`) when it is `None`.
> 
> `BaseConversation` now **copies** `ConversationInitiationData` to avoid mutating caller-provided config, and auto-populates `conversation_config_override.text_only=True` when running without an audio interface (while preserving an explicit user override). Tests add coverage for the new text-only defaults, preservation of explicit `text_only=False`, and non-mutation of the original config object/dicts.
> 
> <sup>Written by [Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot) for commit 7c46f68366d70846fece39f713c5a43f27ca4769. This will update automatically on new commits. Configure [here](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot).</sup>
<!-- /CURSOR_SUMMARY -->

pullRequest.title: [Agents] Fixed bug with init and user_id
pullRequest.body:
Fixes https://github.com/elevenlabs/elevenlabs-python/issues/679

Fixes an issue where `user_id` was incorrectly being grabbed from `self.config` instead of just `self`, meaning it was always set to `None`.
